parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Get Park Reviews Activity

box "Front End" #FFFFE0
actor Client
end box

box "Back End" #F0FFFF
participant "Website Park Page" as WPP
participant "GetParkReviewsActivity" as GPRA
database Reviews
end box

Client -> WPP : Visit park page
activate WPP

WPP -> GPRA : Send get reviews request
activate GPRA

GPRA -> Reviews : Get reviews
activate Reviews

Reviews -> GPRA : Reviews item
deactivate Reviews

GPRA -> WPP : ReviewsModel
deactivate GPRA

WPP -> Client : Present reviews
deactivate WPP

@enduml
```
